jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Design-Tooling Platform
jobs.content:
About the role

Build the design-tooling platform that powers Figma's multiplayer canvas across millions of designers and engineers collaborating in real time.

  • CRDT, OT, and distributed-systems experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Design-Advocacy Strategy
jobs.content: Own Figma's design-advocacy strategy roadmap across enterprise design-system adoption, education, and community-engagement motion-design.
